main.description: Associates a device key with a DID, enabling key→DID lookup for vouch graph traversal and service authorization.

keyId.description: Identifier for the device key (e.g. soft-<uuid> or a did:key).

name.description: Human-readable name or label for this key association (e.g. hostname).

challenge.description: DID that this key is bound to.

service.description: Service scope for this key association.
